rulings.Case Title: JULIUS CASTLE RESTAURANT,INC., VS. JAMES FREDERICK PAYNE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By American Contractors Indemnity Company To Amend Order Re Phyllis Voisenats Motion For Judgment Enforcing Liability On Bond To Correct Clerical Error
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 14, 2015 line 1. RESPONDENT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY's Motion To Amend Order Re Phyllis Voisenats Motion For Judgment Enforcing Liability On Bond To Correct Clerical Error GRANTED. Order Re: Phyllis Voisenat's Motion for Judgment Enforcing Liability on Bond contained a clerical error and is corrected as follows: "Phyllis Voisenat's Motion for Judgment Enforcing Liability on bond is DENIED. Respondent shall file an interpleader." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 14, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT RSM&A FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Second, sixth and eighth causes of action are properly and sufficiently alleged. Additionally, motion is procedurally defective. No grounds for demurrer appear in the Notice of Demurrer; grounds are listed only in the demurrer itself. This is not in compliance with CRC 3.1110. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARD PIAZZA VS. YAREMYS RODRIGUEZ GONZALEZ ET AL (DEFT'S 170.6 CHALLENGE JUDGE QUIDACHAY)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 14, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANTS YAREMYS GONZALEZ and CHRISTOPHER KILDAY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT transferred to Department 613 to be heard on August 14, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REMBERTO SAINEZ VS. ALFREDO FRAUSTO SUAREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice

rulings.Case Title: PNC BANK, NA VS. NELLIE SERVELLON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 14, 2015 line 6. DEFENDANT NELLY SERVELLON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach the operative notice. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE ROMERO VS. JOSE CORNEJO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 14, 2015 line 7. DEFENDANT JOSE CORNEJO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
